core_findings.baseline: SM+GR control reproduces measured inputs only; it is not a derivation.
core_findings.isdlc_tcps_gauge: one-loop gauge sector has partial success/tension: alpha_em(MZ) about -2.8 sigma, sin^2thetaW about +1 sigma, alpha_s about +0.4 sigma.
core_findings.vacuum_ansatz: order-of-magnitude near rho_Lambda but precision determinant/prefactor derivation missing.
core_findings.autodiscovery: can generate compact post-selected hypotheses; quarantined until microscopic spectrum and blind predictions exist.
core_findings.blind_protocol: implemented leakage/holdout controls; train-only candidates fail blind certification.
core_findings.internal_cabibbo_packet: passed internal registry but is not final because it had not been independently externally replicated.
core_findings.external_holdout: failed external tranche; PMNS theta23/Omega_c h2 or sin2beta failures depending on tranche.
core_findings.complete_SM_LCDM: failed: alpha(0), full Yukawa sector, Higgs sector, resolved thresholds, dark sector, and all LCDM parameters remain open.

autodiscovery.reason: The engine can discover compact RGE/vacuum/symbolic hypotheses, but every generated result is post-selected from benchmark constants.  A completed first-principles theory would need an independently specified microscopic spectrum, threshold calculation, and new predictions not used in the search.

holdout_seal.note: Values must not be used during candidate generation.

blind_protocol.strict_conclusion: 현재 엔진 후보들은 gauge/cosmology training targets 위주라서 blind prediction 인증을 통과하지 못했다.

external_v06.reason: External tranche has >3σ failures in PMNS theta23 and Omega_c h^2, and required alpha(0), charged-lepton mass ratios, resolved threshold spectrum, and many SM/LambdaCDM parameters remain unpredicted.

external_precision_failures.source: PDG CKM review 2025 sin2beta world average

academic_v07.partial_positive_result: CKM Vtd/Vts/Vtb/gamma pass; neutrino-sum, beta-decay, proton bound pass; sin2beta fails >3σ; thresholds and quark ratios are not publication-grade scoreable as frozen.
why_not_complete: alpha(0), charged-lepton Yukawa ratios, full quark/lepton Yukawa matrices, Higgs-sector parameters, neutrino CP phase/absolute scale likelihood, and all six ΛCDM parameters are not derived from a microscopic action.
The packet has a >3σ failure in sin2β in the new CKM external tranche.
Threshold spectrum is not resolved into representations/couplings/decays, so collider comparison is not well-defined.
Quark mass ratios lack a common renormalization scheme and matching scale.
